build_check_warning_note: All 17 warnings are DWX_ADVISORY_* from framework include files (QM_Indicators.mqh, QM_StopRules.mqh, QM_EquityStream.mqh), not from the EA .mq5 itself. These are known framework-level advisories, not EA defects.
compile_note: build_check.ps1 ran compile_one internally (metaeditor_exit_code=1 is a MetaEditor quirk — errors=0 and ex5 present confirms success). Separate compile_one.ps1 step skipped to avoid double-compile; .ex5 on disk at 298332 bytes confirms PASS.
open_questions: OnTick ordering: current skeleton has news gate BEFORE ManageOpenPosition. The 2026-07-02 audit binding rule says news gate should be AFTER management. This EA has no critical management during news windows (SL is server-side), so ordering is benign here. Skeleton template should be updated to canonical order per QM5_12821 dc418a720 — this is a template-level issue, not an EA-level defect.

SP500.DWX is backtest-only (DXZ does not route orders). The EA is registered for SP500.DWX per the card's R3 target list and the P2 SATURATION RULE. Live promotion to T6 for SP500.DWX-only runs is forbidden per DWX SYMBOL DISCIPLINE — this is a Board Advisor T6-gate concern.

QM_Sig_Price_Above_MA called with deadband_pts=0: the function signature requires this parameter and it is correctly passed. Verify QM_Signals.mqh implements the zero-deadband case as a pure price-vs-MA comparison.
